summary: Localized weekly digest presentation counts, ratios, compact streaks, relative labels, and week-range labels through Today presentation formatting while keeping WeeklyDigestRules and digest product rules unchanged.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-digest-formatting-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: Digest Today, list, and detail views built count/date labels with inline English interpolation or domain-facing label helpers.
contract_status_changes.after: Digest visible count/date labels route through `WeeklyDigestPresentationFormatting` in Today presentation code backed by localized static and plural resources.
proof: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-digest-formatting-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: Localization resources contained 194 static keys and 7 plural keys, with digest dynamic formatting deferred.
contract_status_changes.after: All 19 locales contain 203 static keys and 11 plural keys, including digest count/ratio/streak/relative-label resources.

residual_risks: Non-English digest values remain English placeholders and require translation-quality review.
Digest insight and highlight summaries remain generated by existing domain helpers and were intentionally not localized in this count/date-label slice.
Domain display names in digest activity rows remain outside this slice and need the planned display-name adapter batch.
The unsigned simulator build passed with the pre-existing TodayView onChange deprecation warning unrelated to this slice.
No running-app locale smoke, screenshot proof, device proof, or TestFlight proof was captured.
recommended_next_reason: Protocol schedule/status projection is the next documented dynamic localization batch after Today dashboard and weekly digest presentation formatting.
